visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
It is applicable in case you are
                                                                        travelling for seasonal work. This visa is given
                                                                        for a period of the stay up to 90 days within
                                                                        180 days.

## Visa Fees

[Table:Tourism]
Above mentioned Visa Fee
                                                                            is to be paid by cash in CNY. Some locations
                                                                            are providing multiple payment solutions.
                                                                            Please check in advance.
                                                                        
Exemption of Schengen Visa
                                                                            Fee
- Children under 6 years on the date of
                                                                            submission
- School pupils, students, postgraduate
                                                                            students and accompanying teachers who
                                                                            undertake stays for the purpose of study or
                                                                            educational training
- Researchers from third countries travelling
                                                                            for the purpose of carrying out scientific
                                                                            research
- Representatives of non-profit organizations
                                                                            aged 25 years or less participating in
                                                                            seminars, conferences, sports, cultural or
                                                                            educational events organized by non-profit
                                                                            organizations
- Family member of EU/EEA and Switzerland
                                                                            nationals.
Service Charge
Applicants applying at the Portuguese Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of EUR34/CNY 268- (inclusive of service tax) payable in cash or mobile payment.

Applicants applying for Appeal Visa shall be levied a service charge of EUR 4/CNY 32- (inclusive of service tax) payable in cash or mobile payment in CNY.
Please Note: 
- The applicable visa fee in CNY is as per the
                                                                            current exchange rate. The same is subject
                                                                            to change without notice.
- There is an optional courier facility
                                                                            available at CNY 80/- (Inclusive of Service
                                                                            Tax) per application / passport.

## Documents Required
- Travel insurance is mandatory for all
                                                                            Schengen countries. If you have not
                                                                            purchased, please 
click
                                                                                here (https://cps.ssish.com/axa/astp/home?utm_source=vfsglobal_mission_site&utm_medium=website&utm_campaign=Portugal_China)
Checklist for Seasonal Work 
No staples on documents.

## Photo Specifications
Note: The
                                                                        photograph submitted must meet with these
                                                                        specifications.
Please provide 1 recent photograph
                                                                        (not more than 6 months old) of yourself. The
                                                                        photographs should be in colour and:
- Taken against a light background (white or
                                                                            off-white) so that features are
                                                                            distinguishable and contrast against the
                                                                            background.
- Clear share quality and with the face in
                                                                            focus.
- Printed on normal photographic paper
                                                                            (camera print).
- Full face, non-smiling [without sunglasses,
                                                                            a hat/cap or other head covering, unless the
                                                                            applicant wears such items because of their
                                                                            religious belief or ethnic background].
- Please stick (not stapled) the Photograph on
                                                                            the Visa Application Form to be handed over
                                                                            along with the documentation during
                                                                            submission at the visa application center.

## Processing Time
Normally, processing time for visa applications is 10 working days (starting from the time when the Embassy received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of this application is required, for example, when you are requested to come to an interview or submit additional documentation. In certain periods of the year high flows of visa requests can increase this period. It is highly advisable to lodge an application with more than two weeks before date of travel.
For Beijing jurisdiction applicant, the visa applications must be submitted with maximum possible advance (30 days at the least) before departure, otherwise and at present the Embassy simply cannot guarantee that it will be processed in time. Thanks for your understanding and support.

## Download Forms
Visa application form has to be
                                                                        completed for all the applicants including
                                                                        minors electronically on your computer or in
                                                                        writing. The VAF has to be filled out in English
                                                                        language Only.
                                                                        The form needs to be signed personally by the
                                                                        applicant in the field 37 and on the last page.
                                                                    
For minors, the application must
                                                                        be signed by one of the parents or a legal
                                                                        guardian. New Visa application form can be downloaded
                                                                        and printed from the link below.
                                                                    
please click  here
New Visa application form can be filled directly
                                                                        in the system and even upload documents from the
                                                                        link below:
https://pedidodevistos.mne.pt/VistosOnline/ (https://pedidodevistos.mne.pt/VistosOnline/)
                                                                        or https://www.vistos.mne.pt/pt/
                                                                         (https://www.vistos.mne.pt/pt/)
To Download a Form:

- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer. 
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

## Overview
Application is applicable in case
                                                                        for one of stated purpose in below table. This
                                                                        visa is given for a travel period more than 90
                                                                        days up to 365 days. It is valid during the
                                                                        entire stay
                                                                        and allow for multiple entries. 

[Table:E type visa]

## Visa Fees

[Table:E type visa]
Above mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid by cash in
                                                                        CNY. Some locations are providing multiple
                                                                        payment solutions. Please check in advance. 
Applicants applying at the Portuguese Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of EUR34/CNY 268/- (inclusive of service tax) payable in cash or mobile payment.

Applicants applying for Appeal Visa shall be levied a service charge of EUR 4/CNY 32- (inclusive of service tax) payable in cash or mobile payment in CNY.

Please Note: 
- The applicable visa fee in CNY is as per the
                                                                            current exchange rate. The same is subject
                                                                            to change without notice.
- There is an optional courier facility
                                                                            available at CNY 80/- (Inclusive of Service
                                                                            Tax) per application / passport.

## Documents Required
- Travel insurance is mandatory for all
                                                                            Schengen countries. If you have not
                                                                            purchased, please 
click
                                                                                here (https://cps.ssish.com/axa/astp/home?utm_source=vfsglobal_mission_site&utm_medium=website&utm_campaign=Portugal_China)
 General Requirements for
                                                                        all type of E-Visa
E1
E2
E3
E4
E5
E6
E7
E8
E9
E10 - Accompanying Family Member Holding Temporary Stay Visa
E11 - Exercise of a Professional Activity Done Remotely - “Digital Nomads”
No Criminal Record Sample
Term of Responsibility

## Photo Specifications
Note: The
                                                                        photograph submitted must meet with these
                                                                        specifications.
Please provide 1 recent photograph
                                                                        (not more than 6 months old) of yourself. The
                                                                        photographs should be in colour and:
- Taken against a light background (white or
                                                                            off-white) so that features are
                                                                            distinguishable and contrast against the
                                                                            background.
- Clear share quality and with the face in
                                                                            focus.
- Printed on normal photographic paper
                                                                            (camera print).
- Full face, non-smiling [without sunglasses,
                                                                            a hat/cap or other head covering, unless the
                                                                            applicant wears such items because of their
                                                                            religious belief or ethnic background].
- Please stick (not stapled) the Photograph on
                                                                            the Visa Application Form to be handed over
                                                                            along with the documentation during
                                                                            submission at the visa application center.

The deadline to decide on a temporary stay visa
                                                                        application is 30 days (starting from the time
                                                                        when the Embassy received the application, not
                                                                        including the transportation time). This
                                                                        period may be extended in specific cases,
                                                                        notably when further scrutiny of this
                                                                        application is required, for example, when you
                                                                        are requested to come to an interview or submit
                                                                        additional
                                                                        documentation.

                                                                        the applicants including minors electronically

visa_types.name: Visa Types
visa_types.overview:
If you are planning a short visit to
                                                            Portugal, you may need to apply for a Schengen visa.
                                                            Portugal is one of the 27 European countries forming the
                                                            Schengen Area which have no border controls between them.
                                                            These countries also issue an uniform visa, the Schengen
                                                            visa for the stay up to 90 days within 180 days.
Long-stay visas, can be either temporary or for residency
                                                            authorization purposes, depending on the duration of the
                                                            stay and granting the visa holder an authorization to stay
                                                            in the country according to different purposes: study,
                                                            internship, work, medical treatment, among others.
Temporary stay visas allow entry and stay in Portugal for
                                                            less than a year. Temporary stay visas are valid during the
                                                            entire stay and allow for multiple entries.
Residency visas allow two entries and is valid for a period
                                                            of 4 months. During that time, the holder of a residency
                                                            visa is required to request a residency permit with the
                                                            Immigration and Border Services (AIMA).

visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa application is
                                                                        applicable in case you are travelling as a
                                                                        member of ADS Tour Groups. This visa is given
                                                                        for a period of the stay up to 90 days within
                                                                        180 days.

## Visa Fees

[Table:Tourism]
Above mentioned Visa Fee
                                                                            is to be paid by cash in CNY. Some locations
                                                                            are providing multiple payment solutions.
                                                                            Please check in advance.
                                                                        
Exemption of Schengen Visa
                                                                            Fee
- Children under 6 years on the date of
                                                                            submission
- School pupils, students, postgraduate
                                                                            students and accompanying teachers who
                                                                            undertake stays for the purpose of study or
                                                                            educational training
- Researchers from third countries travelling
                                                                            for the purpose of carrying out scientific
                                                                            research
- Representatives of non-profit organizations
                                                                            aged 25 years or less participating in
                                                                            seminars, conferences, sports, cultural or
                                                                            educational events organized by non-profit
                                                                            organizations
- Family member of EU/EEA and Switzerland
                                                                            nationals.
Service Charge
Applicants applying at the Portuguese Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of EUR34/CNY 268- (inclusive of service tax) payable in cash or mobile payment.

Applicants applying for Appeal Visa shall be levied a service charge of EUR 4/CNY 32- (inclusive of service tax) payable in cash or mobile payment in CNY.

Please Note: 
- The applicable visa fee in CNY is as per the
                                                                            current exchange rate. The same is subject
                                                                            to change without notice.
- There is an optional courier facility
                                                                            available at CNY 80/- (Inclusive of Service
                                                                            Tax) per application / passport.

## Documents Required
- Travel insurance is mandatory for all
                                                                            Schengen countries. If you have not
                                                                            purchased, please
click
                                                                                here (https://cps.ssish.com/axa/astp/home?utm_source=vfsglobal_mission_site&utm_medium=website&utm_campaign=Portugal_China)
Checklist for ADS Group 
Checklist for ADS Group（Applied on Guangzhou Jurisdiction only ） 
No staples on documents.

## Photo Specifications
Note: The
                                                                        photograph submitted must meet with these
                                                                        specifications.
Please provide 1 recent photograph
                                                                        (not more than 6 months old) of yourself. The
                                                                        photographs should be in colour and:
- Taken against a light background (white or
                                                                            off-white) so that features are
                                                                            distinguishable and contrast against the
                                                                            background.
- Clear share quality and with the face in
                                                                            focus.
- Printed on normal photographic paper
                                                                            (camera print).
- Full face, non-smiling [without sunglasses,
                                                                            a hat/cap or other head covering, unless the
                                                                            applicant wears such items because of their
                                                                            religious belief or ethnic background].
- Please stick (not stapled) the Photograph on
                                                                            the Visa Application Form to be handed over
                                                                            along with the documentation during
                                                                            submission at the visa application center.

## Processing Time
Normally, processing time for visa applications is 10 working days (starting from the time when the Embassy received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of this application is required, for example, when you are requested to come to an interview or submit additional documentation. In certain periods of the year high flows of visa requests can increase this period. It is highly advisable to lodge an application with more than two weeks before date of travel.
For Beijing jurisdiction applicant, the visa applications must be submitted with maximum possible advance (30 days at the least) before departure, otherwise and at present the Embassy simply cannot guarantee that it will be processed in time. Thanks for your understanding and support.

## Download Forms
Visa application form has to be
                                                                        completed for all the applicants including
                                                                        minors electronically on your computer or in
                                                                        writing. The VAF has to be filled out in English
                                                                        language Only.
                                                                        The form needs to be signed personally by the
                                                                        applicant in the field 37 and on the last page.
                                                                    
For minors, the application must
                                                                        be signed by one of the parents or a legal
                                                                        guardian. New Visa application form can be downloaded
                                                                        and printed from the link below.
                                                                    
please click  here
New Visa application form can be filled directly
                                                                        in the system and even upload documents from the
                                                                        link below:
https://pedidodevistos.mne.pt/VistosOnline/ (https://pedidodevistos.mne.pt/VistosOnline/)
                                                                        or https://www.vistos.mne.pt/pt/
                                                                         (https://www.vistos.mne.pt/pt/)
To Download a Form:

- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer. 
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.
